data.name: Hentai Clicker: Sayuri is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Sayuri is streaming

Sayuri, your shameless maid with raven hair and a teasing smile, is ready to serve more than just tea. Every click makes her lose her composure, showing off her curves, blushing harder, and offering new ways to please her master.

🍓 About the Game

Hentai Clicker: Sayuri is streaming blends simple, addictive clicker gameplay with the irresistible charm of a naughty maid fantasy. Tap to excite Sayuri, collect hearts, and unlock a cascade of revealing maid outfits, kinky animations, and explicit voice lines that heat up the screen.

🔞 NSFW Scenes

From innocent bowing and playful cleaning to hardcore maid roleplay dripping with lust, Sayuri turns every duty into pure ecstasy. Expect full-on lewd animations, shameless teasing, and explicit content designed to push your limits.

🎉 Features

🧹 Lewd Maid Fantasy – A devoted servant who mixes obedience with dirty secrets.
🖱️ Clicker Addiction – Simple to play, impossible to put down.
💗 Unlockable Outfits – From classic maid uniform to revealing XXX maid cosplay.
🔊 Explicit Voice Acting – Gasps, moans, and dirty whispers as she submits or teases.
🔥 Progression System – Earn hearts, max her lust, and explore her dirtiest fantasies.

💖 Why You’ll Love It

Sayuri may start as a loyal maid, but under your command she becomes a filthy plaything. Sweet, submissive, and secretly kinky, she’s here to fulfill every perverted request—and she won’t stop until you’re completely satisfied.

🎮 How to Play

🖱️ Click to Collect Hearts – Every tap makes her blush and moan louder.
🔓 Unlock Maid Scenes – Strip her uniform, pose her, and play out your dirtiest maid fantasies.
💥 Upgrade Skills – Speed things up, unlock new reactions, and push Sayuri past her limits.

🎉 Start Your Maid Obsession!

Ready to corrupt the perfect servant? 😈
Jump into Hentai Clicker: Sayuri is streaming and discover just how dirty a maid can really get.

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 韓文, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
